titleStmt.title: SII 20.72: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 72. (B.K. No. 93 of 1936-37.) BIJAPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 36, Khara, Vais11ākha, Puṇṇami, Monday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1111, April 24. Monday, f.d.t. ·62. The eclipse occurred on the next day.

The inscription records a gift of land and house-site as Bhaṭṭavṛitti for reading the Purāṇa made by Perggaḍe Kīrttirāja when Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kumāra Jayakarṇadēva was governing the mahāgrahāra Sindige. The king is stated to be ruling from Jayantīpura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja para
mēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhi
pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ jayantīpurada nelevīḍino
ḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire svasti samasta
prasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara kumāra jayakarṇna
dēvaru mahāgrahāraṁ sindigeyaṁ tribhōgābhyantarasiddhi
yindāḷuttamire perggaḍe kīrttirājanelliṁ śrīmaccāḷukyavi
(kyavi)kramavarṣada 36 neya kharasaṁvatsarada vaiśākhada puṇna
mi sōmavāradandu sōmagrahaṇa parbbanimittaṁ purāṇada
bhaṭṭavrittige sarbbanamasyamāgi paḍeda rēvadāsabhaṭṭara ke
yyiṁ baḍaga biṭṭa piriya kōla matta 5 maneya nivēśana 1
yī dharmmakke koṭṭa śrīmahāgrahā nipā
ḷa lakṣa dharmama
manōharavappa parvva
vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṟipāṇāṁ
kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarbbānētān bhāvinaḥ pārtthivēndrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadra .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasundharā ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 20.72 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
